recommendations.title: The Zone of Interest
recommendations.overview: The commandant of Auschwitz, Rudolf Höss, and his wife Hedwig, strive to build a dream life for their family in a house and garden next to the camp.

recommendations.title: Under the Skin
recommendations.overview: A seductive stranger prowls the streets of Glasgow in search of prey: unsuspecting men who fall under her spell.

recommendations.title: Birth
recommendations.overview: It took Anna 10 years to recover from the death of her husband, Sean, but now she's on the verge of marrying her boyfriend, Joseph, and finally moving on. However, on the night of her engagement party, a young boy named Sean turns up, saying he is he

recommendations.title: Requiem for a Dream
recommendations.overview: The drug-induced utopias of four Coney Island residents are shattered when their addictions run deep.

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: Logan
recommendations.overview: In the near future, a weary Logan cares for an ailing Professor X in a hideout on the Mexican border. But Logan's attempts to hide from the world and his legacy are upended when a young mutant arrives, pursued by dark forces.

recommendations.title: Sherlock: The Abominable Bride
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson find themselves in 1890s London in this holiday special.

recommendations.title: 44 Inch Chest
recommendations.overview: Colin is in agony, shattered by his wife’s infidelity, so his friends kidnap the wife's lover so he can have his revenge.

recommendations.title: Road House
recommendations.overview: Ex-UFC fighter Dalton takes a job as a bouncer at a Florida Keys roadhouse, only to discover that this paradise is not all it seems.

recommendations.title: Dangerous Liaisons
recommendations.overview: In 18th century France, Marquise de Merteuil asks her ex-lover Vicomte de Valmont to seduce the future wife of another ex-lover of hers in return for one last night with her. Yet things don’t go as planned.
